use_cases: Mobile app authentication via QR code scanning in SaaS dashboards
Product linking and deep link sharing in e-commerce storefronts
Contact or profile sharing in media and creator platforms
Configuration or authentication workflows in developer tools
Quick link sharing in general web applications
ai_summary: A hover-activated QR code button component featuring glass-morphism styling with gradient backgrounds and backdrop blur effects. Displays a popover containing a QR code on mouse hover with smooth opacity and scale transitions. Ideal for link sharing, mobile authentication flows, and deep linking scenarios across various web applications.
